title: auth — permissions
description: Permissions on the auth surface split by guard. Tenant-plane permissions (guard: sanctum) gate the self-service session-management surface (view own sessions, revoke own sessions, issue cross-app grants). Platform-plane permissions (guard: platform_admin) gate the identity CRUD + JWT-key management + impersonation. NEVER cross the guard boundary.

permissions.name: sessions.viewAny.own
permissions.description: List the caller's own active sessions across their Applications.

permissions.name: sessions.revoke.own
permissions.description: Revoke a specific session (by PAT id) belonging to the caller.

permissions.name: sessions.cross_app_grant
permissions.description: Issue a cross-Application SSO grant on the caller's behalf. Refused if the caller lacks a User row on the target Application. Requires cross_app_sso entitlement.

permissions.name: platform.auth.impersonate
permissions.description: Start / end impersonation of a tenant User. Requires impersonation entitlement. Every use audit-logged with reason.

permissions.name: platform.auth.jwt_keys.viewAny
permissions.description: List JWT signing keys. Redacted — secret_encrypted never returned.

permissions.name: platform.auth.jwt_keys.view
permissions.description: Show one JWT signing key row (redacted).

permissions.name: platform.auth.jwt_keys.rotate
permissions.description: Rotate to a new kid. Old key marked retired_at=now(); still verify-capable through the rotation grace window.

permissions.name: platform.auth.jwt.revoke
permissions.description: Add jti to the deny list — immediate revocation before natural expiry. Used for breach response.

permissions.name: platform.auth.sessions.viewAny
permissions.description: List active sessions across the platform. Redacted — no PAT plaintext.

permissions.name: platform.auth.sessions.revoke
permissions.description: Revoke a specific session (any User). Used for support-driven session cleanup.

permissions.name: platform.auth.sessions.revoke_all
permissions.description: Bulk-revoke every active session for a given User or Identity. Used for breach response.

permissions.name: platform.identity.viewAny
permissions.description: List identities. Reference to the identity substrate's permission (seeded here since auth OWNS the HTTP route). Redacted by default.

permissions.name: platform.identity.view.pii
permissions.description: Unmute email + dob on identity detail. Every use writes an audit-log entry.

permissions.name: platform.identity.force_password_reset
permissions.description: Invalidate current password + revoke sessions + issue fresh reset token.
